regulation_name: Control of Drugs and Cosmetics Regulations
citation: Control of Drugs and Cosmetics Regulations — Regulation 18A
summary: Cosmetic ads may describe appearance effects but must not claim therapeutic or disease-related benefits.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Skin healing, anti-disease, or medicinal cosmetic claims. ACTION: REJECT — reclassify as cosmetic appearance claim only. CHECK: Product notification (NOT) number and claim type. ESCALATE IF: Therapeutic or NPRA drug-like claim on cosmetic.
